baseGrid.notes: The sheet dimensions are exactly 52x67 cells at 16px. Larger 32px chunks exist visually but the sheet height is not divisible by 32.

volcanic_landforms.description: Volcanoes, craters, lava-adjacent peaks, caves, and round marker tiles.
volcanic_landforms.likelyUse: Large volcanic and mountain POIs, dangerous barriers, lava-region decoration.

lava_forest_terrain_grid.description: Grid-aligned forests, cliffs, lava, desert-like rough ground, and crater terrain.
lava_forest_terrain_grid.likelyUse: Repeatable dangerous terrain tiles and volcanic biome transitions.
lava_forest_terrain_grid.contains: grid tiles with some irregular connected regions

arctic_landforms.description: Snow forests, ice rocks, white mountains, dark castle, and frozen landmark pieces.
arctic_landforms.likelyUse: Snow biome barriers, ice-region POIs, and cold-region decorations.

arctic_terrain_grid.description: Frozen lake, snow cliffs, snowy forest, ice floes, and patterned ice tiles.
arctic_terrain_grid.likelyUse: Repeatable snow/ice terrain and frozen-region connectors.
arctic_terrain_grid.contains: grid tiles with some irregular connected regions

red_roof_city_landmarks.description: Red-roof castles, towns, walls, stairs, towers, mountains, and forest clusters.
red_roof_city_landmarks.likelyUse: Town/castle POIs, roads, city walls, and settlement decorations.
red_roof_city_landmarks.contains: irregular objects and modular city pieces

lake_coast_city_terrain.description: Lake/island terrain, coast edges, forest blocks, roads, ruins, and water patches.
lake_coast_city_terrain.likelyUse: Coastal and lake terrain, shoreline transitions, and settlement-adjacent terrain.
lake_coast_city_terrain.contains: grid tiles with some irregular connected regions

red_blue_town_landmarks.description: Alternate red-roof and blue-roof settlements, stairways, forests, and mountain pieces.
red_blue_town_landmarks.likelyUse: Alternate town/castle POIs and settlement connectors.
red_blue_town_landmarks.contains: irregular objects and modular city pieces

west_coast_forest_terrain.description: Large lake, forest edges, coast, mountain foothills, bridges, and ruin-like structures.
west_coast_forest_terrain.likelyUse: Grass/coast terrain blocks and reachable overworld landmass layouts.
west_coast_forest_terrain.contains: grid tiles with some irregular connected regions

special_landmarks_misc.description: Gray city ruin, roads, small shrines, towers, forest clusters, and isolated castles.
special_landmarks_misc.likelyUse: Special POIs, connector roads, road-side decorations, and rare structures.

east_coast_forest_terrain.description: Alternate lake/coast landmass with forest clusters, paths, bridges, and water edges.
east_coast_forest_terrain.likelyUse: Alternate grass/coast terrain blocks and worldgen landmass templates.
east_coast_forest_terrain.contains: grid tiles with some irregular connected regions

dark_castles_ruins_objects.description: Dark castles, ruins, tower pieces, gray mountains, black roads, and modular dark tiles.
dark_castles_ruins_objects.likelyUse: Late-game POIs, darkland structures, blocked barriers, and dark terrain connectors.

darkland_volcano_terrain.description: Dark lake/crater, caves, ruined paths, lava/dark ground, cliffs, and black terrain.
darkland_volcano_terrain.likelyUse: Darkland terrain, dangerous barriers, cave POIs, and late-game terrain transitions.
darkland_volcano_terrain.contains: grid tiles with some irregular connected regions

warnings: PNG has an RGBA color type, but every alpha value is 255; exact chroma-key removal is required.
The matte is #00B100, not #00FF00; importer removes only that exact RGB value.
